title: NeoCatLib
description: NeoCatLib - library for Minecraft Forge that can do messages on player screen, that will appear and disappear.
body:
NeoCatLib is a library for Minecraft Forge that adds some feautures for mod developers. I made this to make developement process of my mods easier. 

 

Feautures:

You can send player a text that will appear and disappear on screen by serverside. (Server to specific player)

You can send player a message directrly (Server to specific player)
